SavedQuery.name: SLA at Risk
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_estimateddecisiondate lt now+1d and udcsp_status ne 'approved' and udcsp_status ne 'rejected'

SavedQuery.name: Requires Human Review (AI Act art.14)
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_aidecision eq 'requires-review' or udcsp_crossborder eq true

SavedQuery.name: Cross-Border Residency Inbound
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_applicationtype eq 'residency-transfer' and udcsp_crossborder eq true and udcsp_destinationcountry eq @assignedcountry

SavedQuery.name: Denmark Inbox
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_destinationcountry eq 'dk' or (udcsp_country eq 'dk' and udcsp_crossborder eq false)

SavedQuery.name: Sweden Inbox
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_destinationcountry eq 'se' or (udcsp_country eq 'se' and udcsp_crossborder eq false)

SavedQuery.name: Norway Inbox
SavedQuery.fetch: udcsp_destinationcountry eq 'no' or (udcsp_country eq 'no' and udcsp_crossborder eq false)
